meta.title: SwiftBill — Professional Invoicing for Freelancers & Small Businesses
meta.description: Create, send, and track professional invoices in seconds. 15 PDF templates, AI-powered document generation, ZATCA & UAE FTA invoice formatting. Download free on the App Store.
meta.ogDescription: Professional invoicing app for freelancers. 15 templates, AI generation, multi-currency support.

hero.title: Professional invoices
hero.subtitle: Create, customize, and send beautiful invoices with 15 PDF templates, AI-powered generation, and built-in tax formatting for ZATCA & UAE FTA. Get paid faster — from anywhere.
hero.cta: Download Free on the App Store

features.label: Built for Independents
features.title: Everything you need to get paid
features.subtitle: Whether you're a freelancer, designer, contractor, or consultant — SwiftBill handles documents, expenses, and tax formatting so you focus on your work.

documents.title: invoices
documents.description: Create, send, and track professional invoices and receipts

estimates.title: estimates
estimates.description: Win projects with professional estimates and contracts

expenses.title: expenses
expenses.description: Track spending, categorize costs, and see your real profit

ai.title: AI tools
ai.description: 15 templates, AI generation, receipt OCR, and smart autofill

templates.title: 15 Professional Templates
templates.description: Designed for every brand and industry — from Classic to Executive.

global.title: Global Business Ready
global.description: 22 currencies, ZATCA & UAE FTA invoice formatting, and recurring invoices on autopilot.

compliance.label: Tax Formatting
compliance.title: Built for the Gulf Region
compliance.subtitle: SwiftBill generates invoices following published ZATCA and UAE FTA format requirements. Requirements may change — always verify with your tax advisor.

zatca.title: Zakat, Tax and Customs Authority (ZATCA) Phase 1 Format
zatca.subtitle: Saudi Arabia
zatca.description: QR code generation following published TLV encoding specs, Arabic and bilingual invoice formats, VAT calculations, and seller/buyer tax registration number fields.

uae.title: UAE FTA Invoice Format
uae.subtitle: United Arab Emirates
uae.description: Invoice format following published FTA guidelines with TRN display, VAT breakdown, and English/Arabic variants. Not officially certified by FTA.

templates.label: Templates
templates.title: 15 Professional Templates
templates.subtitle: Choose the perfect look for your business. Every template is designed for clarity, professionalism, and impact.
templates.cta: See All Templates in the App

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready to unlock everything.
